## Example

```esql
FROM employees
| KEEP last_name
| EVAL right = RIGHT(last_name, 3)
```

| last_name:keyword | right:keyword |
| --- | --- |
| Awdeh | deh |
| Azuma | uma |
| Baek | aek |
| Bamford | ord |
| Bernatsky | sky |
